narrative:
Paulding Village 2 (precinct in Paulding County) has 788 registered voters, with 62.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
